title: phyllorkis rolfei
intro: Phyllorkis rolfei, also known as the 'Dwarfed Ghost Orchid', is a rare and unique epiphytic orchid species native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phyllorkis rolfei include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and ground into a powder, which can be used as a tea or added to other remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
